title: MediFund
text:
MediFund - SupportGoWhere
MediFund
Share link
For Singaporeans who face difficulties with remaining medical bills after receiving government subsidies and other means of payment.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
Assistance with medical bills
Amount of assistance depends on the applicant's circumstances and bills incurred
Apply through Medical Social Workers at the institution where you received treatment
Collapse all sections
About this support

The actual amount of assistance you receive depends on you and your family members' financial, health and social circumstances, as well as the size of the medical bill incurred.

Who is this for?

To apply for MediFund assistance, you must:

be a Singapore Citizen;

be a subsidised patient;

have received or require treatment from a MediFund-approved institution; and

be having difficulties paying for your healthcare bills after Government subsidies and other means including MediShield Life, MediSave, and cash.

Your application will be assessed holistically, taking into consideration you and your family’s financial, health and social circumstances.

How to apply?

You or your family can approach the Medical Social Workers at the MediFund-approved institution at which you had treatment

In addition to MediFund, they will also be able to explore other possible financing means with you

Where can I find help?

View more details

MediFund applications are administered directly by the MediFund-approved institution. You may wish to first contact the Medical Social Services Department or Business Office Department of the institution you are seeking care at for further assistance.

MOH Hotline: 6325 9220

Scheme last updated 22 Oct 2025
